languages.text: {n}Паск едва заметно морщится, но быстро возвращает на лицо прежнюю хмурую гримасу.{/n} "Я не посвященный, Ваша Светлость, чтобы в таком разбираться. Зазеваешься — любой агрегат тебя на шестерни намотает, костей не соберешь. Уж простите за дерзость, но ничего на ваш вопрос ответить не могу".

traits.locale_text: {n}Паск едва заметно досадливо морщится, но быстро возвращает на лицо прежнюю хмурую гримасу.{/n} "Я не посвященный, Ваша Светлость, чтобы в таком разбираться. Зазеваешься — любой агрегат тебя на шестерни намотает, костей не соберешь. Уж простите за дерзость, но ничего на ваш вопрос ответить не могу".

languages.text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."
languages.original_text: {n}Паск едва заметно морщится, но быстро возвращает на лицо прежнюю хмурую гримасу.{/n} "Я не посвященный, Ваша Светлость, чтобы в таком разбираться. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

languages.text: パスクの口が一瞬引き締まるが、すぐに前の憂鬱な表情に戻った。「そんなことは私の知る権利ではありません。ただ立って見ていると、機械の歯車に巻き込まれて骨まで残らないかもしれません。失礼ですが、これ以上は何も言えません」
languages.original_text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

traits.locale_text: パスクの口が一瞬引き締まるが、すぐに前の憂鬱な表情に戻った。「そんなことは私の知る権利ではありません。ただ立って見ていると、機械の歯車に巻き込まれて骨まで残らないかもしれません。失礼ですが、これ以上は何も言えません。」

languages.text: {n}Pask'ın ağzı bir anlığına gerilse de çabucak eski kasvetli ifadesine dönüyor.{/n} "Böyle şeyleri bilmek benim haddim değildir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Etrafta dikilip aval aval bakmak, bir makinenin dişlilerine kapılmakla sonuçlanabilir. Toplanacak kemik bile kalmaz. Küstahlığımı bağışlayın ama bu konuda söyleyecek başka sözüm yok."
languages.original_text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

traits.locale_text: {n}Pask'ın ağzı bir anlığına gerilse de çabucak eski kasvetli ifadesine dönüyor.{/n} "Böyle şeyleri bilmek benim haddim değildir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Etrafta dikilip aval aval bakmak, bir makinenin dişlilerine kapılmakla sonuçlanabilir. Toplanacak kemik bile kalmaz. Küstahlığımı bağışlayın ama bu konuda söyleyecek başka sözüm yok."

languages.text: {n}La boca de Pask se tensa momentáneamente, pero no tarda en adoptar su habitual expresión torva.{/n} «Estas cosas no son asunto mío, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Yo procuro prestar atención a lo que hago para no acabar triturado por algún mecanismo; no quedarían de mí ni los huesos. Disculpe mi insolencia, pero no tengo nada más que decir al respecto».
languages.original_text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

traits.locale_text: {n}La boca de Pask se tensa momentáneamente, pero no tarda en adoptar su habitual expresión torva.{/n} «Estas cosas no son asunto mío, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Yo procuro prestar atención a lo que hago para no acabar triturado por algún mecanismo; no quedarían de mí ni los huesos. Disculpe mi insolencia, pero no tengo nada más que decir al respecto».

languages.text: {n}帕斯克的嘴角一时紧绷，随即恢复了先前的阴郁。{/n}“大人，这不是我该过问的事。在机械齿轮间徘徊张望容易被卷进去——到时候骨头都变成渣渣了。请原谅我的无礼，关于这事，我没什么可说的了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

traits.locale_text: {n}帕斯克的嘴角一时紧绷，随即恢复了先前的阴郁。{/n}“大人，这不是我该过问的事。在机械齿轮间徘徊张望容易被卷进去——到时候骨头都变成渣渣了。请原谅我的无礼，关于这事，我没什么可说的了。”

languages.text: {n}La bouche de Pask se crispe l'espace de quelques instants, mais il recouvre rapidement son expression morose.{/n} « Ce genre d'informations dépasse le cadre de mes attributions, Votre Seigneurie. Rester planté dans les parages à bayer aux corneilles est le meilleur moyen de se faire happer par les rouages d'une machine au risque d'y laisser sa peau et le reste. Veuillez pardonner mon insolence, mais je n'ai rien d'autre à ajouter à ce sujet. »
languages.original_text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

traits.locale_text: {n}La bouche de Pask se crispe l'espace de quelques instants, mais il recouvre rapidement son expression morose.{/n} « Ce genre d'informations dépasse le cadre de mes attributions, Votre Seigneurie. Rester planté dans les parages à bayer aux corneilles est le meilleur moyen de se faire happer par les rouages d'une machine au risque d'y laisser sa peau et le reste. Veuillez pardonner mon insolence, mais je n'ai rien d'autre à ajouter à ce sujet. »

languages.text: {n}Pask beißt kurz die Zähne zusammen, ehe er dich wieder mit düsterem Blick ansieht.{/n} "Über derartige Dinge weiß ich nichts, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Gaffend herumzustehen, ist ein guter Weg, in das Getriebe einer Maschine zu geraten ... dann bleiben nicht einmal Knochen von Euch übrig. Also bei allem Respekt ... ich habe dazu nichts mehr zu sagen."
languages.original_text: {n}Pask's mouth tightens for a moment, but he quickly recovers his previous gloomy expression.{/n} "It's not my place, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, to know about such things. Standing around gawping is a good way to get tangled up in the gears of a machine — there won't even be bones left to pick up. Pardon my insolence, but I have nothing more to say about this."

traits.locale_text: {n}Pask beißt kurz die Zähne zusammen, ehe er dich wieder mit düsterem Blick ansieht.{/n} "Über derartige Dinge weiß ich nichts, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Gaffend herumzustehen, ist ein guter Weg, in das Getriebe einer Maschine zu geraten ... dann bleiben nicht einmal Knochen von Euch übrig. Also bei allem Respekt ... ich habe dazu nichts mehr zu sagen."
